title: Equivalence Relations and Partitions
description: A flowchart illustrating how an equivalence relation on a set induces a partition into equivalence classes, and vice versa.
elements: Equivalence Class [a] for a in A
relationships: An equivalence relation ~ on a set A defines a unique partition of A into equivalence classes
Conversely, a partition P of a set A defines an equivalence relation ~ where a ~ b if and only if a and b are in the same block of P
